get.description: Return sanitized hassette configuration (allowlisted fields only).

Health check for the telemetry database.

Runs a representative query exercising the listeners -> handler_invocations
join path. Returns 503 with ``degraded: true`` when the database is
unavailable; 200 with ``degraded: false`` when healthy.
List recent sessions with lifecycle data.

schema.title: Response App Listeners Api Telemetry App  App Key  Listeners Get

get.description:
Job summaries for a single app instance, enriched with live heap data.

Live fields (``next_run``, ``fire_at``, ``jitter``, ``cancelled``) are joined
from the live scheduler heap by ``db_id``. On heap failure the DB rows are
returned without enrichment (degraded but functional; logged warning, no 500).

not the manifest-driven app grid.

Framework error counts for the System Health badge.

further narrows to errors from that session.

FrameworkSummaryResponse.title: FrameworkSummaryResponse
FrameworkSummaryResponse.description:
Framework KPI counts for the System Health badge.

Note: total_errors and total_job_errors include timed_out status.
get_error_counts() returns combined counts; splitting would require
a separate query path.

JobSummary.title: JobSummary
JobSummary.description:
Per-job summary returned by ``get_job_summary()``.

``failed`` counts only ``'error'`` status; ``timed_out`` is tracked separately.
Invariant: ``successful + failed + timed_out == total_executions``.

ListenerWithSummary.description: Listener metrics enriched with human-readable handler summary.
